sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A ithuai pen Pa hong sihna hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tua Singlamteh ke'n ngil ngei kei ning (ngei kei ning)
Zawhna minpha ka tut zawh mateng
Tua Singlamteh khah lo len len ning (khah lo len len ning)
Kham lukhu ka khek na ni mateng

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ke'n ka phawk tawntung na a thu in
Kalani mual ah tua pua ding hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sisan luang in Zeisu hong si hi
Pasian Tapa Sisan Siangtho a hong ban na
Tua Singlamteh ka vel vel nuam hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Taina zumna ka thuak pih hang in
Tua hi leh khat vei viang
Amah tawh a min thang khawm dingin
